headline: Customer Stories and Successful Builds
subheadline: See how founders and agencies are using VoiceToWebsite to launch conversion-focused pages in record time.

sections.heading: From Voice to Revenue
sections.body: Every story below started with a single voice prompt. Our engine turned those ideas into live websites that now process payments, capture leads, and sell products.

items.title: Local Service Launch
items.description: A roofing company in Miami used VoiceToWebsite to generate a lead-gen page that converted 4% of traffic in its first week.

items.title: SaaS MVP in 60s
items.description: An AI startup founder generated their landing page, connected Stripe, and launched to Product Hunt in a single afternoon.

cta.heading: Ready to build your own success story?
cta.body: Start with a free preview and see the power of voice-first web design.
